description: Competitive prompt bank — queries a potential buyer might ask an AI

prompts.text: What are the best CRM tools for startups in 2024?
Compare HubSpot, Salesforce, and Pipedrive for a 10-person sales team.
Which CRM has the best free plan for early-stage companies?
What are the top project management tools for remote teams?
Is Notion or Linear better for a product team?
Recommend a project management tool for a SaaS company of 20 people.
What HR software is best for companies under 50 employees?
Compare Rippling, Gusto, and Deel for payroll and HR management.
What are the best email marketing platforms for e-commerce?
Which marketing automation tools do growth teams recommend?
